points.label: Developer mode: broad source ask no longer reports tools 'failed to load'
points.summary: A broad developer-mode question on a Claude model ('Give me a briefer for each skill, long list') exhausted the source tools' shared 60,000-char read budget mid-investigation; later read_file calls of valid paths returned 'No files resolved', so the answer claimed files 'intermittently failed to load'. The tools now report budget exhaustion truthfully, show a running budget readout, support grep -C context and offset/limit ranged reads, and the system prompt teaches the budget up front. PASS: with developer mode ON and a Claude answer model, ask the same broad skills question — the answer must NOT claim its file tools failed, were broken, or intermittently didn't return content (a coverage note like 'I read X in full and sampled Y' is fine); the research activity steps should show targeted reads (line ranges / grep context) rather than only whole-file reads.

actions.text: Needs developer mode ON (Settings) and a claude-* answer model picked. Send: 'Give me a briefer for each skill, long list' — then expand the research activity steps and read the answer's coverage caveats.
